title: WP_PAGE_2163_LIPO_WARM_TRANSLATION_2026-06-05.md
text:
# WP Page 2163 LIPO-WARM Translation - 2026-06-05

## Scope
- Page: `https://www.skinharmony.it/lipo-warm/`
- WordPress post ID: `2163`
- Languages: `en`, `fr`, `de`, `es`
- Method: SkinHarmony Core Translator REST workflow with Core Codex Connector gate.

## Core / Nyra Gate
- Action type: `publish`
- Verdict: `REVIEW_REQUIRED`
- Risk: `low`
- Owner confirmation: `true`
- Report: `reports/codex-core/codex_core_gate_latest.json`

## Rerun From Scratch
- Translator-scoped connector key used with tenant `wwwskinharmonyit`.
- Lock acquired before mutation: `wordpress/plugins/skinharmony-site-suite`.
- Batch command: `SH_TRANSLATE_LANGS=en,fr,de,es SH_TRANSLATE_BLOCK_SIZE=10 node scripts/translate_wp_site_stepwise.js 2163`
- Page strings extracted: `88`
- Result: `88/88` generated for each target language.

## Review Approval
- Initial review queue for `object_id=2163`: `200` pending items.
- Review approvals were executed in small batches through `review/approve`, scoped to `object_id=2163`.
- Total approved: `200`
- Pending count after workflow: `0`

## Runtime Verification
- Public routes returned `200`:
  - `https://www.skinharmony.it/en/lipo-warm/`
  - `https://www.skinharmony.it/fr/lipo-warm/`
  - `https://www.skinharmony.it/de/lipo-warm/`
  - `https://www.skinharmony.it/es/lipo-warm/`
- Public markup check:
  - Italian lead string absent on all four translated routes.
  - EN route contains `Go back` and `Request information`.
  - No review backlog remained for the page after approval.

## Notes
- The earlier blocked publish path was caused by stale context and the wrong connector scope.
- This rerun used the translator-scoped credentials and the page review workflow that already worked on the other translated pages.
- Italian source content was not modified.
- No price changes.
- No numeric technical specification changes.
- No plugin code changes.
- No tenant, key, checkout, CRM or customer data changes.
